title: FuelCell Energy Reports Third Quarter of Fiscal 2024 Results
text: FuelCell Energy Q3 2024 (ended July 31, 2024) revenue was $23.7 million, down 7% YoY. Gross loss was $(6.2) million vs $(8.2) million prior year. Net loss per share was $(0.07) vs $(0.06) which included $0.04 one-time debt extinguishment benefit in Q3 2023. Operating expenses decreased to $27.4 million from $33.2 million YoY, driven by lower legal, consulting, and compensation expenses. Adjusted EBITDA improved to $(20.1) million from $(31.6) million. Revenue breakdown: Product $0.3M, Service agreements $1.4M, Generation $13.4M (up 22%), Advanced Technologies $8.6M (up 83%). Backlog increased 12.6% to $1.20 billion from $1.06 billion as of July 31, 2023. Cash position was $326.0 million (down from $403.3 million). The company completed a capital raise of 95.2 million shares at $0.71 average price, raising ~$65.9 million. Major announcements include service agreement with Gyeonggi Green Energy Co., Ltd. for 42 upgraded fuel cell modules in Korea, and continued expansion with Ameresco in Sacramento.
